urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Jab Aun O Muhammad Nay Maula Ko Bulaya Ho Ga
english translation text: When Aun and Muhammad fell to the ground and called out to Imam Husain
When Aun and Muhammad fell to the ground and called out to Imam Hussain (a.s.), He alone knows the state of their bodies
their mother Zainab did not shed any tears when she saw the bodies of her sons

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
In Dono Kee Lashain Toe Ik Doojay Se Dur Pari TheenMazloom Ne Kaisay In Kee Lashon Ko Jaa Ke, Tanha Maqtal Se Uthaya Ho Ga
english translation text: Their bodies were lying far from each other, how must Imam Husain (a.s.) have carried them back to the tents alone?

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Zainab Kee Goad Bhi Ujri Aur Bhai Kata Maqtal MaiKhaimon Ko Aag Lagee Thee, Sajjad Beemar Ko Kaisay, Jalnay Se Bachaya Ho Ga
english translation text: Zainab has lost her children, and even her brother is martyred, the tents were set on fire, how must Zainab have rescued Imam Sajjad (a.s.) from getting burnt?
